title: Eumel Craft
description: On of my first Texturepacks, a noble fancy one
body:
Your swords and tools are now not only useful, but also extremely stylish. Diamond swords sparkle in the light as if they were treasures from a long forgotten castle.
With the Eumelcraft texture pack you can transform the world of Minecraft into a luxurious adventure. Immerse yourself in the splendor and glamor of this texture pack and make your game a royal affair!
